details.productUrlName: Goldberry River Daughter Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
T: Move a counter of each kind not on Goldberry, River-Daughter from another target permanent you control onto Goldberry.
U, T: Move one or more counters from Goldberry onto another target permanent you control. If you do, draw a card.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Fear nothing! For tonight you are under the roof of Tom Bombadil."
